phrases.cultural_note: The Exotic Garden is open year-round but hours vary by season.

responses.phonetic: wee, duh nuhf UHR ah dee-ZWEET UHR
responses.local: Oui, de neuf heures à dix-huit heures.

phrases.text_local: Peut-on visiter les grottes du jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN vee-zee-TAY lay grot doo zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: Beneath the garden lies a network of prehistoric caves with stalactites and stalagmites. Guided tours are available in several languages.

responses.english: Yes, the guided cave tour is included in the ticket.
responses.local: Oui, la visite guidée des grottes est incluse dans le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view over Monaco
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une vue panoramique sur Monaco depuis le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un VOO pan-oh-RA-meek soor moh-nah-KOH duh-POO luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: The garden's elevated position provides sweeping views over Monaco's harbor, the Larvotto coastline, and into France.

responses.english: Yes, from the terrace, panoramic view of all of Monaco.
responses.local: Oui, depuis la terrasse, vue panoramique sur tout Monaco.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un observatoire dans le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un op-zair-vah-TWAR don luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Observatory Cave features a small astronomical observatory at its entrance. Night visits for stargazing are occasionally organized.

responses.english: Yes, at the entrance of the Observatory Cave.
responses.local: Oui, à l'entrée de la Grotte de l'Observatoire.

phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets for the garden and cave are available. The cave can be damp and cool — bring a light jacket even in summer.

responses.english: Ten euros for adults. Combined tickets available.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: Dix euros pour les adultes. Billets combinés disponibles.
